name: chr20_20q13_33_subtelomeric_SD
description: 20q13.33 distal subtelomeric SD field (last ~500 kb of chr20q). Contains shared subtelomeric duplicons with multiple other chromosome ends, terminal LINE-rich repeats and the OPRL1/COL9A3 paralog region; common site of subtelomeric rearrangements.

architecture.internal_structure: Mosaic of 5-50 kb subtelomeric duplicons at 95-99% identity shared with the subtelomeres of multiple other chromosomes; characteristic terminal SD enrichment; assembly fully resolved only in T2T-CHM13.
